description: Assign all liner elements in the range to the group with the name s . Use of the group logic is described in Groups . Any element may belong to one group only in a given slot. Assigning an element to a new group in that slot will cause it to be removed from its current group assignment. The command structure liner list group command lists the existing element group names. The groups can be visualized with the liner plot item.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group to slot s . If omitted, the group is assigned to the slot named Default .

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: The specified group is removed from the specified slot. If no slot is specified, then the group will be removed from any and all slots it is in.
